title: Sociodemographic and Biomechanical risk factors of Knee OA
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9qqka","text":"This protocol outlines a descriptive cross-sectional study designed to identify sociodemographic and biomechanical risk factors associated with knee osteoarthritis (OA) in the Jashore region of Bangladesh. A total of 383 patients clinically or radiologically diagnosed with knee OA will be recruited, and data will be collected through structured questionnaires and standardized tools including REBA, IPAQ, and Q-angle measurements.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ailkn","text":"The expected results will highlight significant sociodemographic factors (age, sex, BMI, occupation) and biomechanical contributors (posture, physical activity, and knee alignment) that increase the risk of knee OA. Findings will support healthcare providers and policymakers in developing preventive strategies, ergonomic modifications, and community-based awareness initiatives tailored to at-risk populations.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9tqor","text":"This is the first version of the protocol; no prior updates or forks have been made.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"a2l93","text":"Ensure prior ethical approval is obtained from the Institutional Review Board (IRB) before starting the study.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8a0s6","text":"Obtain written informed consent from all participants before any data collection or assessment.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ff53p","text":"Use standardized and validated tools (REBA, IPAQ, Q-angle) consistently for biomechanical assessments.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1tgri","text":"Maintain participant confidentiality at all stages of data collection, storage, and analysis.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b92b6","text":"Ensure all data collectors are trained in study procedures, ergonomic assessment, and questionnaire administration.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fj2cq","text":"Adjust sociodemographic and biomechanical measures when replicating the protocol in different populations or settings.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"6fdqg","text":"Ethical Approval: Ensure that the study has prior ethical approval from the Institutional Review Board (IRB) of the Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation Department, Jashore University of Science and Technology.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7esa1","text":"Informed Consent: Obtain written informed consent from all participants before any data collection or assessment.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9iat8","text":"Participant Safety: Exclude individuals with recent knee surgery, injury, inflammatory arthritis, or any systemic disease to prevent harm.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3mjh","text":"Standardized Tools: Use validated instruments for assessment including REBA, IPAQ, and Q-angle measurements. Follow standardized procedures strictly to ensure reliability.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5t89j","text":"Data Confidentiality: Maintain participant confidentiality at all stages of data collection, storage, and analysis.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3javs","text":"Pre-Start Check: Verify that all data collectors are trained in the protocol procedures, ergonomic assessments, and questionnaire administration.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4ueo6","text":"Replicability Note: When replicating this study in other populations or regions, adjust sociodemographic and biomechanical measures according to local context.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"f0fua","text":"Medical Safety: Do not include participants with recent knee surgery, acute injury, inflammatory arthritis, or systemic diseases as this may pose health risks.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aghfi","text":"Physical Assessment Risk: While performing REBA, Q-angle, or other physical assessments, ensure proper posture and supervision to avoid injury.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":25}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dv7g3","text":"Data Accuracy: Misreporting or incomplete questionnaire data may affect study validity.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e9j1j","text":"Ethical Compliance: Conduct all procedures only after obtaining IRB approval and written informed consent.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e2hef","text":"Replication Caution: When replicating this study in other populations, modify assessment procedures according to local safety and ethical standards.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
